title: scenario.content_json
description: Shape of the scenarios.content_json JSONB column. Partitioned into compute_inputs (hashed for edit-invalidation: any change flips compute_state to STALE and deletes computed_links) and metadata (edits UPDATE the row without transitioning state). Mirrors docs/ewtss/specs/scenario-management-design.md §4.1. BASELINE: the two-partition structure is pinned; inner entity/emitter/antenna field shapes are owned by the typed-entity DTO spec (Transmitter/Receiver/Antenna) and the EW Library (backlog B1.7) and will be tightened as those land.

environment.description: Precipitation / fog / atmospheric settings feeding the link budget (B1.8).

metadata.description: Non-hashed partition. Edits here do not transition compute_state.

emitterRef.description: Reference to an EW Library template plus per-instance overrides (scenario-management-design §4.8).
